title: SQL: UNIQUE constraint not checked
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id INT UNIQUE, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Bob') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INT, value FLOAT, CONSTRAINT unique_id_value UNIQUE (id, value));
key_bug_features: UNIQUE constraint not enforced after deletion
